title: Living Room Parameter Manifest
description: Six knobs an LLM front-end may turn for living_room.

ceiling_height_m.rationale: Higher ceilings are included as a spatial-volume parameter linked to abstract thinking and perceived openness.

daylight_intensity.description: Scalar controlling daylight contribution through windows.
daylight_intensity.rationale: Daylight access is included because light exposure can affect restoration, alertness, and perceived environmental quality.

wall_warmth_index.description: 0 = cooler wall/material palette; 1 = warmer wall/material palette.
wall_warmth_index.rationale: Wall and material warmth are included as affective environmental cues that may influence comfort and stress response.

furniture_density.description: Scalar controlling the amount of major furniture in the living room.
furniture_density.rationale: Furniture density is included as a proxy for clutter and crowding, which can increase cognitive load.

biophilia_count.description: Number of indoor plant entities placed in the room.
biophilia_count.rationale: Indoor plants are included as biophilic restoration cues.

colour_palette_id.description: Named color palette token resolved by the rendering wrapper.
colour_palette_id.rationale: Color palette is included because color temperature and saturation can interact with spatial perception and mood.
